faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Woodlawn homes?
faqs.answer: Woodlawn's older housing stock, mature tree canopy, and humid basement environments create ideal conditions for silverfish. These pests are attracted to moisture, paper products, and the small cracks common in vintage Bronx buildings. Our treatments address both the active infestation and underlying moisture issues.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 silverfish treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your Woodlawn property, targeted application of professional-grade treatments in bathrooms, basements, kitchens and other affected areas, moisture assessment, sealing of entry points, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. Pricing depends on property size and infestation severity.
